title: Verify existing implementation of deep-merge utility
description: The deep-merge utility function in src/utils/deep-merge.ts and tests in src/utils/deep-merge.test.ts already exist. The implementation includes: recursive deep merge, array replacement (not concatenation), null/undefined handling, and comprehensive test coverage. This task is to verify the existing implementation meets requirements.
